predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is not a Union citizen and not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or stay.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or has not made an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: used_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person has used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: Immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, or terminating stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, the person submitted a new residence or international protection application.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible Member State.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible Member State.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
predicates.description: The person declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or residence.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the statutory definition.

predicates.name: holds_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for risk of absconding is met for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a current and real risk of absconding for the person, established following individual examination and based on at least one objective criterion.
